customManagers.description: Dockerfile ARG versions annotated with renovate comments

packageRules.description: Remind about SHA256 checksum updates for binary downloads
prBodyNotes: This package uses SHA256 checksum verification in the Dockerfile. Download the new binary and update the corresponding `_SHA256` ARG before merging.

packageRules.description: Stay on the Python 3.13 series; do not propose 3.14+ upgrades

Pin nvidia/cuda to the 12.x series. Moving to 13.x requires a fleet-coverage check — a meaningful share of Runpod hosts must have drivers new enough to run the target CUDA minor, otherwise nvidia-container-cli refuses to start the container on most hosts. Bump this constraint deliberately after verifying coverage.
